name: chr19_19q13_43_TRIM_KRTAP_xref
description: Terminal 19q13.43 keratin-associated protein (KRTAP) tandem cluster — ~30 KRTAP paralog genes (KRTAP4 subfamily) at 70-95% identity over ~400 kb. Encodes the cysteine/glycine-rich hair-shaft matrix proteins; one of the most variable tandem clusters in the human genome by population CN.

architecture.internal_structure: ~30 KRTAP4 / KRTAP5 paralog genes in tandem at 70-95% identity over ~500 kb; very short intronless coding units of 250-500 bp; abundant inter-copy SDs of 5-30 kb.
